acceptanceCriteria: The branch tree contains both the GH-12 availability feature and main's #10 assessment-confidence feature with no conflict markers and no behavior of either feature removed.

The routing decision and plan carry both the optional availabilityReportHash and the assessment summary; the status enum includes selected, unroutable, and requires-review; exclusion reason codes include UNAVAILABLE and INCOMPATIBLE.
Availability filtering and the low-confidence requires-review gate compose: exclusion runs per candidate and a low-confidence assessment still yields requires-review with no selection.
dist/rigor.cjs is rebuilt from the merged sources.
Full suite (test:all including both features' tests, bench, plugin validate --strict, git diff --check) passes on the merged tree.
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
